name: Update@ouramericanrevival.com
subject: Peter- UPDATE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our American Revival
body:
| | ****[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjIzODcyODAS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQwODExMzU1S0&mt=2&rj=NTQwNzk0OTY4S0&rt=0) Peter-

**We wanted to share some exciting news with you.** Because of your support, and the support of tens-of-thousands of Americans from across the county, we have hit our signature goal. This may not seem like a big deal, but it is! This shows how fed up Americans are with the way that our country is being managed.

Thank you again for taking part, and becoming part of our team. It is because of you that we will be able to bring true change to America.

We do have one more small favor to ask of you. Can you ask your friends and family to join the OAR team? All you would need to do is send them this link: [http://action.ouramericanrevival.com/landing/join-us/ ](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjIzODcyODAS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQwODExMzU1S0&mt=2&rj=NTQwNzk0OTY4S0&rt=0)

Thanks for everything,

Our American Revival

[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjIzODcyODAS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQwODExMzU1S0&mt=2&rj=NTQwNzk0OTY4S0&rt=0)

name: Josh Wolf, MurphyForFlorida.com
subject: Major update:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| I just hit the ground here in Florida and have a major update to share: Hey -- I wanted to quickly introduce myself: I'm Josh Wolf, Patrick Murphy's Campaign Manager. I just hit the ground here in Florida and have a major update to share:

**The U.S. Senate race in Florida was just moved from Tossup/Tilt Republican to PURE TOSSUP!**

That's right: The Rothenberg Political Report's political pundits are watching this race with a close eye. They see the powerful movement Patrick is building in Florida. They see Patrick's strength, no matter who the opponent is. And they had no choice but to adjust the rating.

But make no mistake. There's NOTHING more competitive than a Pure Tossup race. This will be one of the closest -- and most expensive -- Senate races in 2016. So we need everyone on board right now to put Patrick in the lead.

**Can you chip in to help us hit 100 donations by midnight?**

_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._

**[Chip in $5 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-april2015?express_lane=true&refcode=ema_2015-04-08_b1_jw_ldnd-rem&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

**[Chip in $35 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-april2015?express_lane=true&refcode=ema_2015-04-08_b1_jw_ldnd-rem&amount=35&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

**[Chip in $50 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-april2015?express_lane=true&refcode=ema_2015-04-08_b1_jw_ldnd-rem&amount=50&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

**[Chip in $100 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-april2015?express_lane=true&refcode=ema_2015-04-08_b1_jw_ldnd-rem&amount=100&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

**[Chip in $250 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-april2015?express_lane=true&refcode=ema_2015-04-08_b1_jw_ldnd-rem&amount=250&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

**[Or click here to donate another amount.](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-april2015?refcode=ema_2015-04-08_b1_jw_ldnd-rem&amount=50&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

Thanks,

Josh Wolf

Campaign Manager
